target_role.name: server
target_role.start_cmd: FEEDSIM_CONTAINER=target-feedsim FEEDSIM_CPUSET=${DCPERF_FEEDSIM_CPUSET:-0-15} FEEDSIM_MEMS=0 DCPERF_V2_DIR=${DCPERF_V2_DIR:?set DCPERF_V2_DIR} bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/feedsim/start_server.sh

ready_checks.cmd: docker exec target-feedsim bash -lc "cd /DCPerf && python3 benchpress_cli.py list | grep -q '^feedsim'"

feedsim.load_cmd: FEEDSIM_CONTAINER=target-feedsim DCPERF_V2_CONTAINER_DIR=/DCPerf FEEDSIM_BENCHMARK=feedsim_autoscale_mini FEEDSIM_NUM_INSTANCES=1 FEEDSIM_EXTRA_ARGS='-q 50 -d {bench_duration} -w 20' bash {colocation_bench_suite_dir}/online/feedsim/run_client.sh /tmp/feedsim-qps50.log /tmp/feedsim-qps50.json
